data.title: Decentralized science meets AI — legacy institutions aren’t ready
data.description:
Opinion by: Sasha Shilina, PhD, founder of Episteme and researcher at Paradigm Research InstituteScience has always been about pushing boundaries, yet today, many of those boundaries are artificial — walled-off journals, slow-moving institutions and research funding locked behind bureaucratic doors. The system is designed for gatekeepers, not explorers. But what if we could tear down those...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/decentralized-science-meets-ai?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale deposited 5 million USDC into Hyperliquid in the past 12 hours and slowly bought HYPE

data.title: Affected by France's permission for the founder of Telegram to leave the country, TON briefly broke through 3.5 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that influenced by the news that "Telegram founder Pavel Durov has been allowed to leave France", TON briefly broke through 3.5 USDT, and now it has fallen slightly to 3.302 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 16.88%.

data.title: Telegram founder Pavel Durov given permission to leave France
data.description:
Pavel Durov, founder of the popular messaging app Telegram, has left France and relocated to Dubai following approval from a French court. On March 13, Durov reportedly received permission from the French court to depart the country, allowing him to travel to Dubai—a city known for its business-friendly environment and lack of extradition agreements with many nations, according to a Barron’s...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/telegram-founder-pavel-durov-leaves-france?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Telegram founder Pavel Durov allowed to leave France and return to Dubai
data.description: Pavel Durov, founder of the instant messaging app Telegram, has been granted permission by a French court to leave France and has now returned to Dubai. It is reported that Durov left the country with the approval of the authorities. The specific terms of the court's decision are still unclear, and Durov and his legal team have not made any public statements on the matter. (Barrons)

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale’s BTC short position has suffered a floating loss of $1.269 million, with a liquidation price of $85,302
data.description: On-chain data shows that Hyperliquid's 50x leveraged whale added a total of 2.25 million USDC in margin twice in the past 2 hours. Its current BTC short position has a floating loss of 1.269 million US dollars, and the liquidation price is 85,302 US dollars.
